pages.raw_text:
The Great Northern railway has
signed a contract with the telegraph
ers, The contract is approved by
General Manager J. f. Stevens. No
friction between Stevens and the
men occurred, the delay in settle
ment being caused by General Super
intendent f. T.. Ward refusing to
make concessions.


a general raise of $40 per month
will be made in all offices along the
system.


At terminal offices, where the work
Is heavy, eight hours, instead OF IL,
will constitute n days work


Overtime will be paid to all oper-
ntors who are requested to remain
on duty after their regular hours.


Any day operator called during the
night on account of emergency will
be paid overtime.


Overtime will be paid the oper-
ntors,- IN the dispatchers' offices for
Sunday work.


All other operators along the line
